name: Ransomware: Petya / NotPetya IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (Filename, File Hash, Hostname, IP) related to Petya Ransomware is observed.

Note: The Petya_File_Hash, Petya_File_Name, Petya_Hostname, Petya_IP have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS, BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System, BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy, BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud

when the event matches "File Hash" is not NULL OR "Filename" is not NULL OR "Hostname" is not NULL OR "Source Host Name" is not NULL OR "Destination Host Name" is not NULL OR eventdirection != 'L2L' AQL filter query

when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Hash', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Name', "Filename") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "Hostname") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "Source Host Name") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "Destination Host Name") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', "sourceaddress") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', "destinationaddress") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Petya / NotPetya IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: AV/AM, BB:DeviceDefinition: FW / Router / Switch, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS, BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System, BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy, BB:DeviceDefinition: VPN, BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud

AND when the event matches "File Hash" is not NULL OR "Filename" is not NULL OR "Hostname" is not NULL OR "Source Host Name" is not NULL OR "Destination Host Name" is not NULL OR eventdirection != 'L2L' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Hash', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_File_Name', "Filename") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "Hostname") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "Source Host Name") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_HostName', "Destination Host Name") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', "sourceaddress") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Petya_IP', "destinationaddress") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Petya / NotPetya IOC Detected
Event description: An IOC (Filename, File Hash, Hostname, IP) related to Petya / NotPetya Ransomware has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
